overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during golden hour. The character passes a futuristic glass skyscraper, walks through a plaza with an active Trauma Team emergency response scene, and ascends stairs beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial sidewalk with futuristic glass architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a large glass skyscraper and palm trees

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with reflective blue glass facade and geometric design
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
tall purple digital advertisement screen on building facade
futuristic red sports car parked at the curb
futuristic vending kiosk with glowing digital interface
concrete wall with large glowing Japanese characters and Tiger Claws graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit downtown sidewalk dominated by a massive glass skyscraper on the left. Palm trees line the path while pedestrians walk in various directions. A red sports car is parked near the curb, and neon advertisements glow on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with emergency medical response scene

events.description: Trauma Team emergency vehicle comes into view with active pink emergency lights and personnel attending to a patient

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking past the Trauma Team emergency response scene with medical personnel attending to a patient on the ground

notable_agents.action: Trauma Team medic in white and red tactical gear standing guard near the vehicle
medical personnel kneeling and treating an injured person on the ground next to the vehicle

entered.detail: futuristic white emergency vehicle with red cross markings, glowing pink emergency lights, and Trauma Team branding
orange and white striped concrete barriers cordoning off the emergency scene
multi-story residential building with balconies and beige facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza where a Trauma Team emergency vehicle is parked with its pink emergency lights flashing. Medical personnel attend to an injured person on the ground while the character walks past the cordoned-off area. A beige apartment building rises in the background as the glass skyscraper recedes from view.

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete stairs under the elevated highway structure, moving from open plaza to covered area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs beneath the overpass while other pedestrians move up and down the steps

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending beneath the highway overpass
massive concrete highway structure with support columns and billboards underneath
glowing green holographic billboard displaying digital content

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadows and golden sunlight filtering through. A glowing green holographic advertisement is visible on the right as the character climbs toward the upper level, with the beige apartment building now closer and more detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit downtown district that transitions from a polished corporate corridor into a gritty urban underpass. It begins on a sidewalk dominated by a massive glass skyscraper and palm trees, passing a parked red sports car and glowing neon advertisements. As the character moves forward, the glass tower recedes and the scene opens into a plaza where pink emergency lights flash from a Trauma Team vehicle attending to an injured person. The camera then shifts toward a beige apartment building before turning to ascend a wide concrete staircase beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Finally, the lighting blends into a mix of deep shadows and filtering golden sunlight as the character climbs past a glowing green holographic advertisement toward the upper level.
